About Me

Building Digital Solutions from Pakistan

My name is Adeel Rajpoot and I am a BS Information Technology (BSIT) student from Lodhran, Punjab, Pakistan.

I am passionate about technology, web development, automation, and digital solutions. I enjoy building modern websites and creating chatbot systems that help businesses automate customer support and lead generation.

My portfolio includes real business projects from the textile, restaurant, and healthcare industries — all focused on clean design, performance, and user experience. My goal is to help local businesses build a strong digital presence.
